name: extension-demo
description: Self-contained Remotion asset factory for a Chrome extension: demo MP4/GIF + Chrome Web Store store assets. Lives in the extension repo as demo/.

scripts.render:docker: docker build -t extension-demo-render -f Dockerfile . && docker run --rm -v "$(cd .. && pwd)":/work -v /work/demo/node_modules -w /work/demo extension-demo-render bash scripts/render-all.sh
scripts.render:voice: docker compose --profile voice up -d --wait tts && KOKORO_URL=http://tts:8880/v1 docker compose run --rm render; docker compose --profile voice down
